Time to split open a juicy watermelon!
It will take strong focus...

Huh, a watermelon can be that tough?
Wow! An unexpected turn of events...

A crab scurries off with the target?!
One Hero, to the rescue!

Eight perfect slices of watermelon?!
Now that is the mark of a professional.
